programme.desc: Mary sues Theresa for $5,000, claiming she stole her three beloved dogs. Theresa says Mary gave them away after losing her home and refuses to return them or pay. It's a heartbroken owner versus a "kindhearted" caretaker in this canine battle.

programme.desc: Karen Steinhaus sues landscaper Don for $1,500, claiming he took her money but never completed yard work or removed a tree. Don, with 35 years of experience, counters that he did most of the job and delays were weather-related.

programme.desc: Muharrem and Milos sue Peter for $5,000, claiming he wrongfully towed their car without police orders, causing lost wages. Peter countersues for $700, alleging the car had bogus plates and was on the street illegally.

programme.desc: Anthony Franco sues Anabel Orellana De Ramirez for $334.50, claiming she agreed to pay for extra luggage charges he covered to bring items for her family. Anabel denies owing him, saying the suit is revenge for rejecting his romantic advances.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Wendy Noe is suing her husband, Thomas, for $3,000, claiming he stole her cats, winter clothes, and furniture. Thomas denies the claims, saying Wendy didn’t want the cats and is suing to get back into his house.

programme.desc: Cherry Smith sues neighbor Mitchell Martinez for $3,000, claiming his loud behavior damaged her mirror and door. Mitchell denies the accusations, calling Cherry a long-time complainer. He countersues for $1,000, alleging harassment and missed work.

programme.desc: A Mountie (Russell Hayden) tracks mine robbers in 1890s Canada.

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns

programme.desc: Not long after ambitious prospector J. Malcolm Vanderpool takes an interest in the run-down remnants of a small frontier town, fortune seekers from all over rush to gain a silver mine of their own.

programme.desc: Rex (Rex Allen) and Slim (Slim Pickens) journey to Colorado, where Slim is expecting to claim the estate of the departed Zeke Reynolds, but the will also includes Jacqueline Reynolds and the evil Hurley siblings, and a fight ensues.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A Denver widow (Conchata Ferrell) with a daughter becomes a Scottish rancher's (Rip Torn) housekeeper in 1910 Wyoming.

programme.desc: A gunsmith (Lane Chandler) offers to fix outlaws' guns if they release their hostage to him.

programme.desc: The frontiersman (Bruce Bennett) leads settlers to Kentucky, where he makes peace with a Shawnee chief (Lon Chaney).

programme.desc: A rancher's son (Robert Walker) gets his foster brother (Burt Lancaster) in trouble with an unwed mother's brothers.

programme.desc: A federal investigator (Tim McCoy) poses as an outlaw to catch a gang of counterfeiters which has kidnapped a government engraver.

programme.desc: A singing reporter (Roy Rogers) and a framed man (George "Gabby" Hayes) put a town boss out of business.

programme.title: Yodelin' Kid From Pine Ridge
programme.desc: A singing cowboy rides to the rescue when a feud erupts between cattlemen and turpentine manufacturers.

programme.title: Captain Apache

programme.desc: Ted and Dusty infiltrate a band of outlaws to get close to Mr. Gentry, the man who murdered Ted's father.

programme.title: Life Stories on Film

programme.title: Made in Hollywood
programme.sub-title: Zootopia 2, Rental Family, The Thing With Feathers
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of Zootopia 2, Rental Family, The Thing With Feathers, Champagne Problems, and Merry Little Mystery.

programme.title: Made in Hollywood
programme.sub-title: The Hand that Rocks the Cradle, HIM, Hal & Harper, F1
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of The Hand that Rocks the Cradle, HIM, Hal & Harper, Harlan Corben's Lazarus, and F1.

programme.title: Loyalty and Larceny
programme.desc: Broke couple Deon and Tiff accidentally steal a package of premium weed meant for a local dealer working under Queen Pin. Forced to become rookie dealers in Dallas to pay off their debt, they fumble their way through the drug game while trying to survive the ruthless Queen Pin and a vengeful rival, C-Mo. When they uncover a deeper betrayal, they must fight for their lives and a shot at running their own LA empire.

programme.title: District Queens
programme.desc: "Queen of the city", Racine, has helped her neighborhood succeed, but her daughters may destroy it all.

programme.title: Deadly Housewife
programme.desc: Florence is a housewife who yearns for something new and exciting in her love life. Things turn deadly real quick when she doesn’t get what she wants.

programme.title: Have You Seen My Man?
programme.desc: After a long night of partying, Niecey's man Chase is nowhere to be found. Just when things couldn’t get any worse, here comes the exes and their drama. The tables turn and the finger pointing begins, Niecy knows there's no turning back now, she has to find the truth and her man.

programme.title: Heavy
programme.desc: When being young and hood rich is no longer a priority Renz turns his focus to something physically and mentally finer. But when walls and barriers begin to break, things begin to get HEAVY and he realizes he has to choose between love and loyalty.

programme.title: Heavier
programme.desc: After a tragic night in the city, lovers, friends and family are forced to take on the dominating forces. Many are left to choose life or death.

programme.title: EscapeCation
programme.desc: This year, Sean offers his smart home to be used for his annual vacation getaway with his college friends. Once everyone arrives and has settled in, they soon find out that they have actually been locked inside, by the home's virtual assistant, SIMON. Everyone becomes terrified when they find out that the only way they can escape is by playing Simon's twisted games. Whatever SIMON SAYS goes.

programme.title: Fall Semester
programme.desc: Kid Kypree is a college student with dreams and ambitions of becoming the next great stand-up comic. One night he gets invited to a party hosted by his old friend Bo that thrusts him into a whirlwind of opportunities and challenges that will test his friendships, resolve, and his sense of humor. He will soon discover that success comes with its own set of comedic twists and turns!

programme.title: How Did We Get Here
programme.desc: Four struggling couples attend a wellness retreat led by Dr. Sellers. Melonie and Derrick struggle with issues of infidelity, Omar and Sonya struggle with commitment, Chastity and Monae have differing opinions on parenthood, and Stephanie and Delvin are struggling with their intimacy. As the couples dive into their treatment, they must confront their own demons to move forward. Will they make it out together? Or go their separate ways?

programme.title: Angel and Demon
programme.desc: When sheltered college student Angel, the daughter of the police chief, falls for Romelle “Demon” Montez, the ruthless leader of the South Side Mobb, they instantly become star-crossed lovers. Their toxic romance spirals into a world of gang violence and threatens Angel’s once promising future.

programme.title: Queens of Dope City
programme.desc: Joselyn, Kendra and Alicia are partners in a rideshare service they have created together, but are struggling financially to maintain the business. One day Joselyn gives a man named Donte a ride who presents her with an opportunity to keep the business going. Things then begin to spiral out of control when they soon are chased down from the law, and must escape Donte.

programme.title: Deadly Squatters
programme.desc: Eugene and Laura return home from vacation to find that two young siblings have taken up residence in their home, and have now claimed legal rights as squatters. Forced to share their home with two strangers, they must play their wicked games and survive psychological terror as the legal system takes its time.

programme.title: The Agony and the Ecstasy
programme.desc: When rival gangster Derrick Smith is released from prison, the beef with Armand Rossi explodes into an all-out war in Fountain City, MO. After a hit on his family , Armand goes into killer mode. Derrick and Vic Moore team up for revenge , but Rossi and his partner Qua stay ahead. When they involve Dr. Monica Gaye in the plot , she flips the script to survive. A devastating loss sends a grieving Armand past the point of no return , forcing him to eliminate every one of his opps.

programme.title: Cougar
programme.desc: Donna and her young college son Brandon live in a nice suburban area of Atlanta, until a new and mysterious older woman moves in next door. Donna invites her over to dinner where she and Brandon connect, and build a connection that is deadly and manipulative. A mother must save her son before it’s too late.

programme.title: Cougar
programme.desc: Donna and her young college son Brandon live in a nice suburban area of Atlanta, until a new and mysterious older woman moves in next door. Donna invites her over to dinner where she and Brandon connect, and build a connection that is deadly and manipulative. A mother must save her son before it’s too late.

programme.title: In Transit
programme.desc: In New York City, friends Leon and Rollo, live a fast life of drugs and women. From an unexpected mistake in their past, they owe a debt to a well-known drug kingpin. They soon find out the fast money is more than they bargained for, but leaving it behind, will prove to be even more challenging.

programme.title: It Is What it is
programme.desc: Victoria, a sophisticated young woman, is trying to find happiness with a good man in the midst of drugs and violence in the mean streets of KC.

programme.title: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Jessica is the smartest girl on campus tutoring the most popular football player, Ryan. He is loved by many but he also has a few enemies. After the football team wins the championship game, Ryan decides to throw an after party at his house. When campus police find Ryan’s dead body, multiple people have a motive to want him dead. Will Jessica and her friend uncover the truth before it’s too late?

programme.title: Fractured
programme.desc: When a woman stumbles upon undeniable proof of her husband's infidelity, reality takes an unexpectedly bizarre turn and the truth becomes stranger than fiction. This thrilling narrative is skillfully woven through the perspectives of multiple characters. With each character's viewpoint, fresh layers of information are unveiled, gradually unraveling a shocking twist that will leave viewers stunned, defying all expectations.

programme.title: Busted and Disgusted
programme.desc: Two sisters, Faith and Promise, overcome their difficult childhood following the death of their mother to cancer. Faith has it all, a successful career and a loving husband, but Promise feels threatened by her older sister’s success, and seeks to claim her happiness for herself.

programme.title: Bissonnet
programme.desc: When Drea gets kicked out of school, she turns to the streets to make some money. What she does not know is that fast money and life on the streets of Bissonnet come at a high price.

programme.title: 10 Kilos in the Trunk
programme.desc: Tonya needs to make some quick cash for the holidays, and takes a job transporting cocaine. On the way to the drop-off, her car breaks down in the middle of nowhere. While walking to a gas station for help, she is stopped by a police officer, and arrested for several warrants. Now in jail, Tonya, gets her friend Monica to make the delivery. Monica must get the car fixed, avoid a thief looking to steal the product, and make the delivery by the deadline or both will face deadly consequences.

programme.title: South Side Hero
programme.desc: After serving a 10-year sentence on a RICO charge, reformed gangster Tommy ‘Ace’ Crown returns home to find his 15-year old daughter Sierra missing after she ran away with a man she met online. When the police decline to help, Ace is determined to track her down himself.

programme.title: Double Standards
programme.desc: A upstanding perfect couple of their community church 'First Lady Trezjiir Jonez a devoted wife, of Pastor Noble Jonez, that lives a unknown double life, decides to engage in pre-marital counseling sessions in their unstable home, where sexual desires of hidden thirsty passion enter as a fatal demise' will the sin be forgiven or will it be the ultimate judgment day

programme.title: My Plus Size Bachelorette
programme.desc: Symone, a spirited and vibrant plus-size woman in her 30s, finds herself navigating the unpredictable world of modern dating while grappling with the emotional aftermath of her one-night stand with Andre, her high school sweetheart. With her friends rallying around her, they encourage Symone to embrace her single status and embark on a journey of self-discovery and love.

programme.title: Scarred
programme.desc: Nate meets and hooks up with the beautiful Mia after a night out. Everything is beautiful, until Nate’s wife Kamryn discovers his infidelity. The love triangle begins to spiral as everyone is on edge, and that some actions have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Her Last Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Athena Hart thought she had seen every kind of broken soul—until Lucas Morningstar walked into her office. What begins as therapy quickly twists into a deadly game of obsession and revenge.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.sub-title: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
programme.desc: Feel the ground shake as the 2026 Monster Jam season kicks off with a high-octane battle in Salt Lake City. Watch legendary icons like Grave Digger and Megalodon go head-to-head against reigning World Finals champion Blake Granger in Monster Mutt Dalmatian and Armando Castro, who is celebrating 25 years of El Toro Loco. From the precision of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge to the adrenaline-fueled chaos of a Freestyle finale packed with backflips and drifting, these elite athletes push 12,000-pound machines to their absolute limits.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: Experience the raw power of the Arena Championship Series West as Monster Jam Replay takes over the Golden One Center in Sacramento, California. Round 4 features high-stakes action starting with JCB Racing, where Armando Castro and El Toro Loco battle through the bracket to defeat Carson Williams in Thunderoarus for the racing title. The excitement continues with the Great Clips Skills Challenge, featuring technical maneuvers and two-wheel stunts. The night reaches its peak during Freestyle, where Blake Granger and Monster Mutt Dalmatian deliver a spectacular performance, including a signature backflip, to sweep the competition. After a fierce battle against top competitors like Matt Cody in Grave Digger, Blake Granger is crowned the BKT Overall Event Champion.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.desc: Monster Jam Stadium Championship Series Red returns to Houston as Adam Anderson continues to chip away at Camden Murphy’s series points lead. Will Bakugan Dragonoid remain on top or will Grave Digger regain the lead, and Tom Meents returns to the city where he debuted Max-D twenty years ago.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Stadium Championship Series Red returns to St. Louis for round 4 of 26. Only 3 points separate Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy from Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson. Will truck gremlins continue to plague Anderson and can Murphy get his second consecutive Event Championship?

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.desc: Experience the high-octane intensity as Round 6 of Monster Jam Fast Track takes over the iconic AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas. Watch as 12 world-class athletes, including icons like Tristan England in JCB Digatron and Adam Anderson in Grave Digger, push their 12,000-pound machines to the limit across three grueling competitions. The stakes are higher than ever in the JCB Racing bracket, where mechanical drama—like smoke pouring from Mike Pagliarulo’s Excalibur—threatens to derail championship dreams. From the technical precision of the Skills Challenge to the gravity-defying backflips of Freestyle, the "Home of the Dallas Cowboys" provides the ultimate stage for raw power and fearless rivalries.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.desc: Grave Digger begins his third decade of domination during Monster Jam's first stop of the 2002 season in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Championship Series

Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy has the series points lead and tries to keep Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson from continuing his climb back to the top in Tampa. While Megalodon’s Todd LeDuc attempts to win his second straight Overall Event Championship.

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.desc: Experience the high-octane energy of the rodeo capital of the world as Monster Jam Fast Track hits NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas. In Round 5 of the Stadium Championship Series West, the world's most elite drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit across three grueling competitions: JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and the fan-favorite Freestyle. Rivalries reach a boiling point as Ryan Anderson and Tyler Menninga battle for the series points lead, while rising stars like Dalton Widner in Shell Shocked stun the crowd with gravity-defying maneuvers. From the precision of the racing brackets to the chaotic brilliance of freestyle, witness a night of shattered limits and historic performances that culminates in a surprising overall event championship for Bryce Kenny and Tech Deck Wreck Deck.
